data.title: Embectra Corp "embecta" (Nasdaq: EMBC) to discuss Q3 2025 financial results on Aug 8, at 8:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Embecta Corp. (Nasdaq: EMBC) based in Parsippany, New Jersey, will hold a conference call on August 8, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. ET to review its fiscal third quarter financial results and operational progress. The company, known for its 100-year history in insulin delivery, is transitioning into a diversified medical supplies organization. This marks a significant shift in strategy for embecta, highlighting its ambitious growth plans in the sector. Investors and stakeholders are invited to participate in the call to gain insights into the company’s performance and future outlook.

data.title: Profound Medical (NASDAQ: PROF; TSX: PRN) to report Q2 2025 financial results on August 14 after market close.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, Profound Medical Corp. (NASDAQ: PROF; TSX: PRN), a leading medical device company specializing in non-invasive therapies for tissue ablation, is set to reveal its Q2 2025 financial outcomes post-market on Thursday, August 14, 2025.

data.title: Rakovina Therapeutics announces incentive program for exercising up to 19.2M warrants from private placement.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on July 24, 2025, Rakovina Therapeutics Inc. (TSXV: RKV), a biopharmaceutical firm using AI for cancer treatments, shared plans to launch an early exercise warrant incentive program. This initiative aims to boost the exercise of about 19,200,000 common share purchase warrants issued during a non-brokered private placement from June 26, 2024, to July 26, 2024. The program is part of the company's strategy to advance its AI-powered drug discovery efforts.

data.title: Minerals Technologies Inc. reports Q2 earnings: EPS $1.44, $1.55 excluding special items, up 36%; operating income $75M, $79M, up 25%.
data.description: The Earnings per Share increased to $1.44, or $1.55 when excluding special items, marking a 36% sequential growth. The Operating Income also rose to $75 million, or $79 million when excluding special items, showing a sequential increase of 25%.
Uniti and Windstream have received regulatory approvals to finalize their merger, achieving a major milestone in their consolidation process.

data.title: OPAL Fuels (NASDAQ: OPAL) to release Q2 earnings on August 7, 2025, with investor call scheduled for August 8 at 11:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: OPAL Fuels Inc. (Nasdaq: OPAL) has revealed its earnings report for the second quarter that concluded on June 30, 2025. The details will be made public after markets close on August 7, 2025. To discuss these results, a conference call is set for August 8, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET. For investors looking to join the call, a listen-only option will be available at https://edge.media-server.com/mmc/p/95r93xjt. An alternative method to follow the presentation is through a webcast on the company's website.

data.title: Algernon finalizes private placement financing, raising $5 million.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global COVID-19 cases have surpassed 150 million, with the death toll exceeding 3.1 million. The United States remains the worst-hit country with over 32 million confirmed cases and more than 575,000 deaths. India also continues to battle a surge in cases, with over 18 million reported infections. The vaccination efforts have seen progress, with more than 1.1 billion doses administered worldwide. However, the uneven distribution of vaccines remains a concern, especially in low-income countries. The economic impact of the pandemic is significant, with global GDP contracting by 3.5% in 2020. Governments and health organizations are urging continued vigilance and adherence to safety measures to curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Absci plans to sell $50 million of common stock in public offering, may offer additional $7.5 million.
data.description: Vancouver-based biopharmaceutical company Absci Corporation (Nasdaq: ABSI) has kicked off an underwritten public offering of $50 million in shares of its common stock. They are also planning to provide the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to an additional $7.5 million in shares. Absci's entire share allocation in this proposed offering will be put up for sale. The company, known for developing potential ground-breaking therapeutics utilizing generative AI, is aiming to boost its financial standing through this move.

data.title: Ocean Power Technologies, Inc. reports strong fiscal 2025 results, entering fiscal 2026 with record backlog and pipeline.
data.description: OPT has started fiscal year 2026 with an unprecedented backlog and pipeline. The company has reported a record number of outstanding contracts waiting to be fulfilled. Additionally, their pipeline of potential future projects has also reached an all-time high. This influx of work showcases the strong demand for OPT's services and bodes well for their financial performance in the upcoming year.

data.title: Tanya Simon appointed as Executive Producer for '60 Minutes' after two decades with the show amidst network shifts.
data.description: After more than 20 years on the show, Tanya Simon will be stepping into a new role during a period of notable transition for the network.

data.title: Ocean Power Technologies announced full year fiscal 2025 results, including $12.5M backlog, $137.5M pipeline, $5.9M revenues.
data.description: Ocean Power Technologies, Inc. (OPT) reported financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter ending April 30, 2025. The company disclosed a backlog of $12.5 million, up 158% from the previous year, with a pipeline of $137.5 million reflecting an 88% increase from April 30, 2024. Operating expenses for the year were $23.3 million, down 28% from the prior year. Revenues saw a 6% increase to $5.9 million. OPT also announced various strategic partnerships and collaborations, such as with Remah International Group, Unique Group, Elektron SAS, and Ocean Wave Solutions Ltda. Management expressed positive outlook and focused on disciplined execution, recurring revenue expansion, platform adoption acceleration, and long-term shareholder value delivery. Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments as of April 30, 2025, totaled $6.9 million. The net loss was $21.5 million for FY25, an improvement from $27.5 million in FY24. The company obtained Facility Security Clearance from the U.S. Department of Defense. A conference call on July 25, 2025, shed more light on OPT's financial status and future plans.

data.title: Sensient Tech (NYSE: SXT) declares a dividend of $0.41 per share, payable on Sept 2, 2025, to shareholders on record by Aug 4.
data.description: In Milwaukee, the Board of Directors of Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend for its common stock at $0.41 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on September 2, 2025, to shareholders recorded on August 4, 2025. Sensient Technologies Corporation, a renowned global company, specializes in producing and promoting colors, flavors, and various specialty ingredients. Leveraging advanced technologies, Sensient has established itself as a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: Logansport Financial Corp. reported net earnings of $413,000 in Q2 2025, up from $349,000 in 2024. Total assets reached $260.2 million, deposits $223.8 million. Dividends paid: $0.90/share in 1H 2025, same as in 2024.
data.description: Logansport Financial Corp., parent company of Logansport Savings Bank, reported net earnings of $413,000 for the quarter ended June 30, 2025, compared to $349,000 in 2024. Year-to-date earnings for 2025 were $790,000 versus $617,000 in 2024. Diluted earnings per share for the first half of 2025 were $1.45, up from $1.01 in 2024. Total assets as of June 30, 2025, were $260.2 million, an increase from $249.6 million in 2024. Total deposits were $223.8 million in 2025, compared to $211.7 million in 2024. The company paid $0.90 per share in dividends in the first half of 2025, unchanged from 2024. Forward-looking statements in the press release highlighted potential risks and uncertainties impacting future financial performance. Key financial data for June 30, 2025, and June 30, 2024, were also provided.

data.title: Intel's Q2 revenue exceeded expectations at $12.86B, but EPS missed at -10 cents per share. Key growth areas: Client Computing, Data Center and AI, All Other. Stock details on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Intel Corp (NASDAQ: INTC) released its second-quarter financial results, exceeding expectations. The company reported a revenue of $12.86 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $11.91 billion. However, Intel reported an adjusted loss of 10 cents per share for the quarter, falling short of the estimated one cent per share in earnings. Despite this, the total revenue for the quarter remained flat compared to the previous year. The breakdown of revenue by category is as follows: Client Computing Group generated $7.9 billion, marking a 3% decline year-over-year. Data Center and AI brought in $3.9 billion, showing a 4% increase over the previous year. The All Other category recorded $1.1 billion in revenue, representing a substantial 20% growth year-over-year. Overall, Total Intel Products amounted to $11.8 billion. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Geospace Technologies to report Q3 and 9-month results on Aug 7, 2025; earnings call set for Aug 8 at 10 a.m. ET.
data.description: Houston-based Geospace, listed on NASDAQ as GEOS, is set to announce its third-quarter results for 2025 and nine-month performance on August 7, 2025. The company has scheduled a conference call for August 8, 2025, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results.

data.title: Google supported blockchain game in global campaign; My Lovely Planet 1st Web3 game featured on Google Play. Blockchain seen as technology layer, not just for money. Future is frictionless integration for platform adoption.
data.description: The CEO of My Lovely Planet, Clément Le Bras, notes that Web3 gaming is moving closer to mainstream acceptance, with platforms like Google Play starting to view blockchain as a seamless backend component rather than just a way to make money. This shift is seen as a significant step for blockchain-based games as My Lovely Planet recently became the first Web3 game featured in Google's global #WeArePlay campaign. Le Bras emphasizes that platforms now see blockchain as a technology layer and not just a revenue strategy. He envisions a future where the integration of blockchain is smooth and unobtrusive for users, providing added value as trust and engagement grow. The current stock price of Google parent company Alphabet can be checked for updates.
